name: temporal_unfolding
description: A sequential synthesis demonstrating ordered progression: from simple pattern (Sierpinski) to intermediate complexity (dragon curve) to organic emergence (plant), showing how complexity unfolds through stages

store_memory.content: Sequence synthesis 'temporal_unfolding' - demonstrates ordered progression from simple (sierpinski) to moderate (dragon) to complex (plant), mirroring how understanding develops in stages

temporal_mark.insight: Third weave mode demonstrated: sequence - ordered progression from foundation to development to culmination
